tasks.subject: unified-agent-hub [P1] Add AGENT_PROFILE keyboard shortcut definition
tasks.description:
Add the `AGENT_PROFILE` keyboard shortcut definition to the centralized shortcut registry at `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/shortcuts.ts`.

## Implementation

Add a new entry to the `SHORTCUTS` object in `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/shortcuts.ts`. The shortcut goes in the Navigation group, after the existing navigation shortcuts.

```typescript
// In the SHORTCUTS object, after SHORTCUTS_PANEL:
AGENT_PROFILE: {
  id: 'agent-profile',
  key: 'mod+shift+a',
  label: 'Agent profile',
  group: 'navigation',
},
```

The key combo `Cmd+Shift+A` (Mac) / `Ctrl+Shift+A` (Windows) is chosen because:
- `Cmd+Shift` is the established modifier pattern for feature shortcuts (`Cmd+Shift+N` for new session).
- `A` is mnemonic for "Agent".
- It does not conflict with any existing shortcut in the `SHORTCUTS` registry.

## Verify No Conflicts

Check the existing shortcuts to confirm no collision:
- `mod+k` (command palette)
- `mod+b` (toggle sidebar)
- `mod+.` (toggle canvas)
- `?` (shortcuts panel)
- `mod+shift+n` (new session)
- `mod+1`, `mod+2`, `mod+3` (sidebar tabs)

`mod+shift+a` is unused.

## Test Updates

If `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/__tests__/shortcuts.test.ts` has snapshot or count-based assertions, update them to account for the new shortcut entry. The test should verify:
- The new shortcut appears in the navigation group
- `formatShortcutKey` produces `'\u21e7\u2318A'` on Mac and `'Ctrl+Shift+A'` on Windows

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `SHORTCUTS.AGENT_PROFILE` exists with id `'agent-profile'`, key `'mod+shift+a'`, label `'Agent profile'`, group `'navigation'`
- [ ] `formatShortcutKey(SHORTCUTS.AGENT_PROFILE)` returns correct platform-specific display string
- [ ] The shortcut appears in the Keyboard Shortcuts reference panel under "Navigation"
- [ ] No conflicts with existing shortcuts
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors
- [ ] Existing shortcut tests still pass

tasks.subject: unified-agent-hub [P3] Disambiguate global settings with App Settings label and tooltip
tasks.description:
Change the settings gear icon tooltip, aria-label, and dialog title from "Settings" to "App Settings" to disambiguate global settings from per-agent configuration in the new Agent Hub.

## Change 1: Sidebar Footer Settings Button Label

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/model/sidebar-contributions.ts` (or wherever the sidebar footer contributions are defined -- search for the settings entry in `SIDEBAR_FOOTER_BUTTONS`):

Change the settings button label:

```typescript
{
  id: 'settings',
  icon: Settings,
  label: 'App Settings',  // was: 'Settings'
  onClick: () => { /* existing handler */ },
  priority: 2,
},
```

This label is used as the `aria-label` in `SidebarFooterBar`.

## Change 2: Add Tooltip to Settings Button

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SidebarFooterBar.tsx`:

Wrap the settings button in a `Tooltip` component. The footer bar renders buttons from the `sidebar.footer` slot contributions. Find where each button is rendered and wrap in a tooltip:

```typescript
import { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent } from '@/layers/shared/ui';

// In the button rendering loop:
<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
    <button onClick={handleClick} aria-label={label}>
      <Icon className="size-(--size-icon-sm)" />
    </button>
  </TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent>{label}</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>
```

NOTE: This adds tooltips to ALL footer buttons, not just settings. This is a UX improvement -- all icon-only buttons should have tooltips for discoverability. Verify if tooltips already exist before adding.

## Change 3: Settings Dialog Title

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/SettingsDialog.tsx`:

Change the dialog title from "Settings" to "App Settings":

```typescript
// Find the dialog title element and change:
<DialogTitle>App Settings</DialogTitle>
// was: <DialogTitle>Settings</DialogTitle>
```

Search for the exact title element in the file. It may be using a `TabbedDialog` component with a `title` prop, in which case change the prop value.

## Test Updates

Update `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/__tests__/SidebarFooterBar.test.tsx`:
- Update any assertions that check for the text "Settings" to check for "App Settings"
- Add test that tooltip renders with correct text

Update any tests in `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/` that assert the dialog title.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Gear icon button `aria-label` is "App Settings" (not "Settings")
- [ ] Tooltip on gear icon reads "App Settings"
- [ ] Settings dialog title reads "App Settings"
- [ ] All existing references to the old "Settings" label in these specific locations are updated
- [ ] The palette item label for settings can remain "Settings" (it's unambiguous in the palette context)
- [ ] All affected tests pass
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors

tasks.subject: unified-agent-hub [P3] Remove AgentDialog and clean up obsolete code
tasks.description:
Remove the AgentDialog modal, its consumer wrappers, context, store, dialog contribution, and PanelsSlice fields. Streamline the SessionSidebar by removing absorbed agent-scoped content.

This is the most impactful cleanup task. It removes the old surface and trims the SessionSidebar.

## Files to Delete

Delete the following files:

| File | Reason |
|------|--------|
| `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/ui/AgentDialog.tsx` | Replaced by `AgentHub` |
| `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/ui/consumers/IdentityTabConsumer.tsx` | Hub uses direct context |
| `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/ui/consumers/PersonalityTabConsumer.tsx` | Hub uses direct context |
| `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/ui/consumers/ToolsTabConsumer.tsx` | Hub uses direct context |
| `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/ui/consumers/ChannelsTabConsumer.tsx` | Hub uses direct context |
| `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/ui/NoAgentFallback.tsx` | Replaced by hub empty states |
| `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/model/agent-dialog-context.tsx` | Replaced by `AgentHubProvider` |
| `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/model/use-agent-dialog.ts` | Replaced by `useAgentHubStore` |
| `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/__tests__/AgentDialog.test.tsx` | Replaced by hub tests |
| `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/app-layout/model/wrappers/AgentDialogWrapper.tsx` | No longer needed |

## Files to Modify

### 1. Remove agent dialog contribution

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/app-layout/model/dialog-contributions.ts`:
- Remove the `agent` entry from `DIALOG_CONTRIBUTIONS`
- Remove the `AgentDialogWrapper` import

```typescript
// Remove this entry:
{
  id: 'agent',
  component: AgentDialogWrapper,
  openStateKey: 'agentDialogOpen',
  priority: 6,
  urlParam: 'agent',
},
```

### 2. Remove PanelsSlice agent dialog fields

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/app-store/app-store-panels.ts`:
- Remove `AgentDialogTab` type export
- Remove from `PanelsSlice` interface: `agentDialogOpen`, `agentDialogInitialTab`, `setAgentDialogOpen`, `openAgentDialogToTab`
- Remove their implementations from `createPanelsSlice`

```typescript
// Remove from PanelsSlice interface:
agentDialogOpen: boolean;
agentDialogInitialTab: AgentDialogTab | null;
setAgentDialogOpen: (open: boolean) => void;
openAgentDialogToTab: (tab: AgentDialogTab) => void;

// Remove from createPanelsSlice:
agentDialogOpen: false,
agentDialogInitialTab: null,
setAgentDialogOpen: (open) =>
  set(open ? { agentDialogOpen: true } : { agentDialogOpen: false, agentDialogInitialTab: null }),
openAgentDialogToTab: (tab) => set({ agentDialogOpen: true, agentDialogInitialTab: tab }),
```

### 3. Update agent-settings barrel

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/index.ts`:
- Remove `AgentDialog` and `useAgentDialog` exports
- Add exports for the tab components that the hub wrappers import:

```typescript
/**
 * Agent settings feature -- tab components for agent configuration.
 *
 * @module features/agent-settings
 */
export { IdentityTab } from './ui/IdentityTab';
export { PersonalityTab } from './ui/PersonalityTab';
export { ChannelsTab } from './ui/ChannelsTab';
export { ToolsTab } from './ui/ToolsTab';
```

### 4. Update shared model barrel

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/index.ts`:
- Remove `type AgentDialogTab` export
- Remove `useOpenAgentDialog` and `useAgentDialogDeepLink` exports

### 5. Remove deep-link hooks

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/use-dialog-deep-link.ts`:
- Remove the `useAgentDialogDeepLink` function
- Remove the `useOpenAgentDialog` function
- Keep all other deep-link hooks (`useSettingsDeepLink`, `useTasksDeepLink`, `useRelayDeepLink`)

### 6. Remove DialogContribution urlParam 'agent'

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/extension-registry.ts`:
- Remove `'agent'` from the `urlParam` union type in `DialogContribution.urlParam`

```typescript
// Before:
urlParam?: 'settings' | 'agent' | 'tasks' | 'relay' | 'mesh';
// After:
urlParam?: 'settings' | 'tasks' | 'relay' | 'mesh';
```

### 7. Streamline SessionSidebar

Modify `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SessionSidebar.tsx`:

Remove agent-scoped content that has moved to the hub:
- Remove `OverviewTabPanel` (agent-specific stats, promo sections)
- Remove `ConnectionsView` (adapter connection status)
- Remove `TasksView` (schedules, running tasks)
- Remove `SidebarTabRow` (no longer needed if only sessions remain)
- Remove hooks: `useConnectionsStatus`, `useActiveTaskRunCount`, `useAgentToolStatus`, `useSidebarTabs`, `useTaskNotifications` (if no longer needed)

The post-migration component becomes:

```typescript
export function SessionSidebar() {
  const { sessions, activeSessionId } = useSessions();
  const { handleNewSession, handleSessionClick, handleDashboard } = useSidebarNavigation();
  // ... fork/rename callbacks remain ...

  const groupedSessions = useMemo(() => groupSessionsByTime(sessions), [sessions]);

  return (
    <>
      <SidebarAgentHeader
        agentName={currentAgent ? getAgentDisplayName(currentAgent) : undefined}
        onDashboard={handleDashboard}
        onNewSession={handleNewSession}
      />
      <SidebarContent data-testid="session-list">
        <SessionsView
          activeSessionId={activeSessionId}
          groupedSessions={groupedSessions}
          onSessionClick={handleSessionClick}
          onForkSession={handleForkSession}
          onRenameSession={handleRenameSession}
        />
      </SidebarContent>
    </>
  );
}
```

### 8. Update all remaining references

Search for ALL remaining references to the deleted items and update them:
- `agentDialogOpen` -- any component reading this state
- `setAgentDialogOpen` -- any component calling this setter
- `openAgentDialogToTab` -- any component using this action
- `useAgentDialog` (the old feature-local store) -- any import
- `AgentDialogWrapper` -- any import
- `AgentDialog` -- any import or reference

Files that may have references (search and fix each):
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/agents-list/ui/AgentsList.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/agents-list/ui/AgentRow.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/agents/ui/AgentsPage.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/ui/CommandPaletteDialog.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/ConnectionsView.tsx`
- Any test files that reference the deleted components

### 9. Update resetPreferences

In `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/app-store/app-store.ts`, the `resetPreferences` function may reference `agentDialogOpen`. Remove it from the reset if present.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 10 files listed for deletion are removed
- [ ] `DIALOG_CONTRIBUTIONS` no longer includes the `agent` entry
- [ ] `PanelsSlice` no longer includes agent dialog fields
- [ ] `DialogContribution.urlParam` type no longer includes `'agent'`
- [ ] `agent-settings/index.ts` exports tab components (IdentityTab, PersonalityTab, ChannelsTab, ToolsTab) but NOT AgentDialog or useAgentDialog
- [ ] `SessionSidebar` is streamlined to show only session list + header
- [ ] No import errors or TypeScript compilation errors across the entire codebase
- [ ] All references to deleted symbols are updated or removed
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] No broken deep-links (old URLs redirect via task 3.4)
